title: Tetrion Easy Spray Paint, Gloss White, 400 ml (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
PROFESSIONAL QUALITY: Our acrylic spray paint is designed for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts, offering a high-gloss finish that adds a professional touch to any project
FAST-DRYING FORMULA: Experience a quick-drying finish that ensures your projects are ready in no time Ideal for busy schedules without compromising on quality or durability
VIBRANT COLOUR RANGE: Choose from an array of vibrant colours that provide excellent coverage, ensuring your finished product stands out with a beautiful, consistent finish
VERSATILE APPLICATION: ideal for a variety of uses, including automotive, home, garden, and craftwork This spray paint is suitable for most surfaces like wood, metal, and plastic
INTERIOR & EXTERIOR USE: Specially formulated for both interior and exterior tasks, this spray paint maintains its appearance and finish even under adverse weather conditions
description: Tetrion Easy Spray is a multipurpose, acrylic-based spray paint that is suitable for use on a range of surfaces both exterior and interior. The Easy Spray aerosols are suitable for practically every surface, including metal, wood, MDF, ceramic and plastic. So whether it's a the washing machine, that new chest of drawers, a wicker basket, or your old bike that needs touching up, these spray tins of paint are ideal
